user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of employee management email templates, so that I can see all configured email types and descriptions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows the Email type, Description and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view an individual email template, so that I can review its content before it is sent
acceptance_criteria: Given email templates are listed; When I click View on a template; Then that template's details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the email templates list, so that I can access all 32 templates
acceptance_criteria: Given more templates exist than fit on one page; When I use the pagination controls; Then the next set of templates is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the email templates list, so that I always see the latest templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
